title: Dutch Frittata
description: A delicious and easy-to-make breakfast dish made with eggs, cheese, and vegetables.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
Add the shredded cheese to the eggs and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into the frittata and stir to combine.
Transfer the frittata to a baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the frittata from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
Optional: add diced vegetables, such as bell peppers or onions, to the egg mixture for added flavor.
